storage_policy.copyright_boundary: Store only paraphrased visual methods, native-PPT translations, and failure probes; do not store copied media, frames, screenshots, transcripts, source layouts, brand marks, or raw assets.

diagnosis.failure: Run 2.8 proves traceable data-to-code execution, but the visible result still reads as cards, boxes, panels, and report-like grids.
diagnosis.repair_principle: Upgrade the extracted data from design principles to visual primitives that can be implemented as native editable PPT modules.

primitive_repairs.visual_problem: The slide reads as stacked cards because each proof unit receives similar shape weight and spacing.
primitive_repairs.reference_method: Use an editorial spread: one oversized claim field, one narrow proof rail, and one anchor object that breaks the equal-panel rhythm.
primitive_repairs.extracted_visual_primitive: Asymmetric editorial canvas with a dominant text/object field and a subordinate evidence rail.
primitive_repairs.native_ppt_translation: Render editable native headline text, a native proof rail, one anchor shape group, and guide lines; no copied layout or rasterized full slide.
primitive_repairs.code_module_obligation: Call a drawRun29EditorialSpread function before drawing any card-like proof block, then record primitive id, module id, and trace geometry.
primitive_repairs.motion_or_sequence_recipe: Reveal the dominant claim before proof rail details; proof appears as a route, not as equal boxes.
primitive_repairs.boxiness_failure_probe: Fails if the contact sheet first reads as a box grid rather than an editorial spread.
primitive_repairs.qa_probe: At contact-sheet scale, the slide should show one dominant field and one secondary rail before any detail is read.
primitive_repairs.anti_copy_boundary: Do not copy course examples, screenshots, grids, source brand, exercise files, or lesson prose.

primitive_repairs.visual_problem: The product proof surface is currently a flat placeholder, so it looks like another rectangle instead of a believable product system.
primitive_repairs.reference_method: Build an original product surface using layered planes, offset shadows, active state chips, and one decision path.
primitive_repairs.extracted_visual_primitive: Layered product-surface stack with foreground action, middle evidence layer, and muted background context.
primitive_repairs.native_ppt_translation: Use editable native rounded-free rectangles, lines, chips, connectors, and text; generated images may only be ambient background, not proof content.
primitive_repairs.code_module_obligation: Call a drawRun29LayeredProductSurface function that creates depth through offsets, scale, opacity, and native connectors, then traces active-layer ids.
primitive_repairs.motion_or_sequence_recipe: Build depth from back layer to front layer, then reveal the active decision path.
primitive_repairs.boxiness_failure_probe: Fails if the product surface can be reduced to one flat box with labels.
primitive_repairs.qa_probe: The viewer should perceive foreground, middle, and background layers before reading labels.
primitive_repairs.anti_copy_boundary: Do not copy product UI, icons, source brand, screenshots, interaction layouts, or product names.

primitive_repairs.visual_problem: Motion learning is mostly trace metadata, so the static deck does not show how the story builds toward the climax.
primitive_repairs.reference_method: Represent motion as a storyboard strip with scale, pause, and handoff states instead of naming motion in copy.
primitive_repairs.extracted_visual_primitive: Three-beat native storyboard: setup state, transformation state, and handoff state with clear scale delta.
primitive_repairs.native_ppt_translation: Draw editable native mini-scenes, arrows, scale markers, and sequence labels; do not store or embed source video frames.
primitive_repairs.code_module_obligation: Call a drawRun29MotionStoryboard function that creates ordered native scene objects and records reveal order in trace.
primitive_repairs.motion_or_sequence_recipe: Beat one orients, beat two transforms, beat three hands off; no beat may be a duplicate card.
primitive_repairs.boxiness_failure_probe: Fails if the storyboard is visually indistinguishable from three equal boxes.
primitive_repairs.qa_probe: Contact-sheet review should show a visible progression and climax beat without reading the captions.
primitive_repairs.anti_copy_boundary: Do not copy video frames, audio, transcript text, source camera composition, or source brand.

primitive_repairs.visual_problem: The climax object is larger in Run 2.8, but it still sits inside a report-like composition.
primitive_repairs.reference_method: Stage the climax like a keynote reveal: one theatrical focal object, one verdict phrase, and supporting proof pushed to the perimeter.
primitive_repairs.extracted_visual_primitive: Climax stage with central hero object, dark or high-contrast field, perimeter evidence, and a deliberate pause zone.
primitive_repairs.native_ppt_translation: Use editable native grouped objects, contrast fields, connector highlights, and restrained text; do not flatten the climax.
primitive_repairs.code_module_obligation: Call a drawRun29ClimaxStage function that reserves the stage field, blocks dashboard grids, and records hero bounds in trace.
primitive_repairs.motion_or_sequence_recipe: Reveal the stage field first, then scale the hero object, then reveal perimeter evidence after the pause.
primitive_repairs.boxiness_failure_probe: Fails if the climax object appears trapped inside a box or competes with equal panels.
primitive_repairs.qa_probe: The climax slide must be the strongest visual break in the full-series contact sheet.
primitive_repairs.anti_copy_boundary: Do not copy keynote slides, source product UI, source brand, camera framing, screenshots, or transcript text.

primitive_repairs.visual_problem: Large text alone is not enough; Run 2.8 type changes still sit on box-based layouts.
primitive_repairs.reference_method: Use typography as the composition field: type scale, cropping-safe alignment, sparse markers, and one object that responds to the headline.
primitive_repairs.extracted_visual_primitive: Typographic field where the headline shapes the canvas and smaller proof objects orbit it.
primitive_repairs.native_ppt_translation: Render editable native type, marker shapes, and one response object; keep all claim text editable and avoid text-as-image.
primitive_repairs.code_module_obligation: Call a drawRun29TypographicField function that lays out text as a field before any supporting object is drawn, then records type-object trace relationships.
primitive_repairs.motion_or_sequence_recipe: Headline appears first as the field; supporting object responds after the message is understood.
primitive_repairs.boxiness_failure_probe: Fails if the headline is merely placed inside a box rectangle or followed by a card grid.
primitive_repairs.qa_probe: At thumbnail scale, the cover and close should read as typographic compositions, not title slides above boxes.
primitive_repairs.anti_copy_boundary: Do not copy source type specimens, brand marks, screenshots, event graphics, or source layouts.
